Help Center

Support

We fight alongside our warriors.

Try password, launcher, latency, or PvP.

No answers matched that search. Try a broader keyword or contact support below.

Common Questions

Frequently Asked

Account
Technical
Gameplay
Account
How do I reset my password?+
Password reset functionality will be enabled when the launcher officially releases. If you lose access to your account before then, please contact support.
Can I change my username?+
Username changes will be supported via the Account settings page upon the game's full release. Please choose your initial war name carefully during registration.
How do I enable two-factor authentication?+
Two-factor authentication (2FA) will be available in Account Settings prior to the beta launch. We strongly recommend enabling it once the security portal goes live.
I was banned — what do I do?+
Submit a ban appeal via support@ironveilstudios.com with your account username and a detailed description. Appeals are reviewed within 5 business days.
Technical
The launcher is not available for download. Why?+
The game client is currently in final network testing. Pre-downloads will open shortly before the beta begins. Stay tuned to your registered email for updates.
Where can I check server requirements?+
Full server locations and technical network requirements will be posted on the dispatch board once we officially announce the stress-test dates.
How do I report website issues?+
If you encounter issues with registration or layout bugs, email bugs@ironveilstudios.com with your browser details and a screenshot.
What are the minimum system requirements?+
OS: Windows 10 64-bit  ·  CPU: Intel i5-6600 / AMD Ryzen 5 1600  ·  RAM: 8 GB  ·  GPU: GTX 1060 / AMD RX 580  ·  Storage: 8.4 GB SSD. See the download page for full specs.
Gameplay (Intended Design)
How will the PvP flagging system work?+
Our intended design allows any player to be flagged for PvP outside safe zones. We are currently tuning a 30-second cooldown for unflagging. Final rules will be tested during Alpha.
How will I join a guild?+
Upon the launch of the Guild System, players will access a dedicated UI panel to browse alliances by name or tag. Guild warfare mechanics are slated for our second beta phase.
What happens when I die in PvP?+
Current design documents state that death will result in gear durability loss and dropped resources. We aim to avoid permanent gear loss unless holding cursed loot. We will validate this heavily in testing.
Will the Voidrift region be available at launch?+
The Voidrift region is planned as our primary endgame zone. Access will require completing the “Rift Seeker” campaign, projected to be available in the late stages of Beta.
Direct Help

Still Need Help?

Email Support
support@ironveilstudios.com
Response within 24 hours on business days. Include your account username for faster resolution.
Send Email

bugs@ironveilstudios.com
Found something broken? Help us improve the game. Detailed reports with reproduction steps are rewarded.
Report a Bug
Direct Line

Send a Message

Can’t find your answer above? Reach us directly. We respond within 24 hours.

Message Received

A dark fantasy MMORPG set in a shattered world. Forge alliances, conquer kingdoms, and claim the throne.
